# Pull Request

## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Wiki content (drafts/)

## Verification

- [ ] `cd project && npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `cd project && npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested in `npm run dev` for UI changes
- [ ] If publish pipeline changed: round-tripped a draft through `./publish.bash`

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should know — design tradeoffs, follow-ups, things you're unsure about.
